note.authorString: Breadth Test Medical Center rooming staff
note.text: Weight obtained on standing scale #2 in street clothes without shoes; patient declined gown. Scale #1 was out for calibration per biomedical engineering ticket BTMC-2024-008841, so the measurement was taken on the backup unit which historically reads approximately 0.2 lb heavy according to the most recent quarterly calibration report. Patient reports intentional weight loss of about 6 lb since the spring visit attributable to a structured walking program (45 minutes daily, 5 days per week) and reduced portion sizes; she was counseled to continue current diet and exercise habits and to return for a recheck at the next annual preventive visit. This deliberately long narrative exists to exercise renderer wrapping, truncation, and pagination behavior for multi-sentence note text.
